2: Visibility: By putting both OSD and GlobalKeyboardHook inside namespace SlotCopyApp, they become part of the same "family." The compiler will stop complaining because it now knows exactly which OSD class you're talking about.
3: Organization: For an engineering project of this scale (persistence, tray icons, hooks), keeping everything in one namespace is standard practice so you don't have to write using statements for every file.
